name: @ttflows/flowdeck
description: A free third-party desktop theme tool maintained by TTFlows.

scripts.check: node scripts/check-branding.mjs && python -m py_compile scripts/scaffold_skin.py && node --check assets/reference-skin/scripts/injector.mjs && node --check assets/reference-skin/assets/renderer-inject.js && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('assets/reference-skin/skin.json','utf8'))"
